ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the media source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the media source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media source */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the media source is based */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the media source */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the media source (e.g., newspaper, magazine, online news) */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Year the media source was founded */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the media source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bias_ratings" (
  "bias_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bias rating */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media source being rated */,
  "bias_name" TEXT /* Name of the bias rating (e.g., Extreme Left, Center) */,
  "bias_description" TEXT /* Description of the bias rating */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Numerical score representing the bias level */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator who assigned the rating */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bias_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bias_ratings_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES media_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bias_ratings_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factual_ratings" (
  "factual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factual rating */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media source being rated */,
  "factual_name" TEXT /* Name of the factual rating (e.g., Very Low, Mostly Factual) */,
  "factual_description" TEXT /* Description of the factual rating */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Numerical score representing the factual accuracy level */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator who assigned the rating */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factual_ratings_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factual_ratings_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES media_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credibility_ratings" (
  "credibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credibility rating */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media source being rated */,
  "credibility_name" TEXT /* Name of the credibility rating (e.g., Low, High) */,
  "credibility_description" TEXT /* Description of the credibility rating */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Numerical score representing the credibility level */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator who assigned the rating */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credibility_ratings_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES media_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credibility_ratings_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderacy_ratings" (
  "moderacy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderacy rating */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media source being rated */,
  "moderacy_name" TEXT /* Name of the moderacy rating (e.g., Extreme Left, Center) */,
  "moderacy_description" TEXT /* Description of the moderacy rating */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Numerical score representing the moderacy level */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator who assigned the rating */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderacy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderacy_ratings_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderacy_ratings_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES media_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assigned_ratings" (
  "assigned_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assigned rating */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media source being rated */,
  "assigned_bias_rating" INTEGER /* Assigned bias rating */,
  "assigned_factual_rating" INTEGER /* Assigned factual rating */,
  "assigned_credibility_rating" INTEGER /* Assigned credibility rating */,
  "assigned_moderacy_rating" INTEGER /* Assigned moderacy rating */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator who assigned the rating */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assigned_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assigned_ratings_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES media_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assigned_ratings_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating history entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media source being rated */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "bias_rating" INTEGER /* Bias rating at the time of the entry */,
  "factual_rating" INTEGER /* Factual rating at the time of the entry */,
  "credibility_rating" INTEGER /* Credibility rating at the time of the entry */,
  "moderacy_rating" INTEGER /* Moderacy rating at the time of the entry */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator who assigned the rating */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES media_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
